findings.issue: Foundation Law implementation is conflated with constitutional laws; no distinct 'Foundation Law' exists in codebase or docs. Confusion risks misalignment with CEO's intent.
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify whether 'Foundation Law' refers to existing Constitution Part 1 (Laws 1-5) or a new legal entity framework. If the latter, define in `docs/` and link to incorporation tasks in `memory/atlas/company-state`.
